_description: Provenance log for Privacy Panel policy data. Each entry records when a company's privacy policy was analyzed, the URL used, the source method, and (once implemented) a path to a stored snapshot of the exact document. company_slug is a foreign key to companies.json.
snapshot_storage_note: snapshot_path will reference files in policies/snapshots/ once live fetching is implemented.

snapshot_stats.note: Network egress proxy restricts access to most external domains from the Cowork VM. Only anthropic.com was reachable. To capture remaining snapshots, run pdf_utils.py locally with unrestricted internet access.
